advancement.efn.obtain_air_tachi.descrip: A razor-edged blade awakened by bloodshed, though skeletal remains and blood rust warn of its cursed nature...
advancement.efn.obtain_air_tachi.title: §b§l[Bloody Killing]
advancement.efn.obtain_co_tachi.descript: §8The steel-forged evolution of Bloodfury, where bones celebrate their gruesome banquet
advancement.efn.obtain_co_tachi.title: §4§l[Osteofrenzy]
advancement.efn.obtain_exsiliumgladius.d: §8The crimson blade thirsts for its twin. Together they shall dance the dance of ruin.
advancement.efn.obtain_fire_exsiliumglad: §8Flames lick the obsidian edge. The left blade completes the pair, unlocking their true devastation.
advancement.efn.obtain_hf_blade.title: §b§lLet's Dance!
advancement.efn.obtain_hf_murasama.descr: The Only Thing I Know For Real.....
advancement.efn.obtain_hf_murasama.title: §c§lLet's Dance!
advancement.efn.obtain_meen_spear.descri: §7The Netherite lance hums with residual heat. Its weight alone could crush a skull.
advancement.efn.obtain_meen_spear.title: §c§l[Duskfire Awakens]
advancement.efn.obtain_mortal_blade.desc: 不死斬り....確かに、もらい受けた
advancement.efn.obtain_nf_dual_sword.des: §7Obtained the paired blades from the lost city. Their whispering echoes the forgotten techniques of ancients.
§7This saber still bears the crest of the first Nether expedition. Its edge has tasted demon blood.
advancement.efn.obtain_yamato_dmc.title: §1§l[YAMATO - Unbound]
advancement.efn.obtain_yamato_dmc4.descr: §bThe sheath trembles with restrained power. §o§l『Too slow...』
advancement.efn.obtain_yamato_dmc4.title: §3§l[YAMATO - Exiled]
advancement.efn.toast.hf_blade: My sword was a tool of justice
advancement.efn.toast.hf_murasama: The mountains don't give back what they take.
advancement.efn.toast.yamato_dmc: Born in flames, I have been blessed
effect.efn.battle_continuation.descripti: increased movement speed and damage, immune to ranged damage; death occurs after Fighting Spirit ends
effect.efn.gradual_heal.description: Restores total health equal to [%5 of max health * potion effect level] over the duration
effect.efn.sin_stun_immunity.description: Immune to all types of stun
efn.config.animation_blacklist.desc:
Entities that won't play Yamato's stun animations (format: modid:entity_id)
Example: ["minecraft:wither", "minecraft:ender_dragon"]
efn.config.animation_whitelist.desc:
Entities that can play Yamato's stun animations (format: modid:entity_id)
Example: ["minecraft:player", "minecraft:zombie", "minecraft:skeleton"]
efn.config.dualsword_dodge_timeslow_ampl:
Strength level of time slowdown effect
1 = 1% speed, 2 = 2% speed, 3 = 3% speed, 4 = 4% speed, 5 = 5% speed
Default: 5
efn.config.dualsword_dodge_timeslow_dela:
Delay before time slowdown effect starts (in ticks)
20 ticks = 1 second. This creates a brief pause before the slowdown
Default: 4 ticks
efn.config.dualsword_dodge_timeslow_dura:
End time of time slowdown effect (in ticks)
20 ticks = 1 second. When the time slowdown end
Default: 7 ticks
efn.config.enable_bloodlust_posteffect.d:
Enable/disable post-effect when bloodlust's skill active
When enabled, bloodlust's skill will play post-effect
Default: true (enabled)
efn.config.enable_dualsword_dodge_timesl:
Dualsword dodge timeslowdown
Disable time slowdown effect that Dualsword dodge
Default: true (enabled)
efn.config.enable_judgementcut_end_camer:
Enable/disable camera animations for JudgementCut-End
When enabled, JudgementCut-End will play cinematic camera animations
Default: true (enabled)
efn.config.enable_judgementcut_end_parti:
Enable/disable particle effects for JudgementCut-End
Disable Judgement Cut End's particle effects that may cause rendering incompatibility
Default: true (enabled)
efn.config.enable_yamato_parry_timeslowd:
Yamato parry timeslowdown
Disable time slowdown effect that Yamato parry
Default: true (enabled)
efn.config.judgement_cut_end_boss_damage:
Damage multiplier against bosses
This multiplies the damage when attacking bosses
Default: 1.0 (no multiplier)
efn.config.judgement_cut_end_cut_rate.de:
Cut rate for Judgement Cut End (percentage of max health)
This determines how much percentage damage is dealt based on target's max health
Default: 0.4 (40%)
efn.config.judgement_cut_end_damage_rate:
Base damage rate for Judgement Cut End
This multiplies the base damage calculation
Default: 2.0
efn.config.judgement_cut_end_health_perc:
Health percentage used in damage calculation
This is the percentage of max health used in the formula: cutRate * (maxHealth * healthPercentage)
Default: 0.4 (40%)
efn.config.yamato_catcher_blacklist.desc:
Entities that CANNOT be caught by Yamato Catcher (format: modid:entity_id)
These entities will be ignored regardless of knockback resistance
Example: ["minecraft:wither", "minecraft:ender_dragon"]
efn.config.yamato_catcher_whitelist.desc:
Entities that CAN be caught by Yamato Catcher (format: modid:entity_id)
These entities can be caught regardless of knockback resistance
Example: ["minecraft:player", "minecraft:zombie"]
efn.config.yamato_globalstun_whitelist.d:
Entities that can be Global Focus stunned by Yamato successful parry + attack combo (format: modid:entity_id)
These entities will receive YamatoStunEffect when hit
Use 'modid:all' to include all entities from a mod
Example: ["minecraft:zombie", "cataclysm:all", "iceandfire:all"]
efn.config.yamato_parry_stun_cooldown.de: Cooldown between parry stuns (in ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
efn.config.yamato_parry_stun_duration.de: Duration of stun effect applied after successful parry + attack combo (in ticks, 20 ticks = 1 second)
efn.config.yamato_parry_timeslow_amplifi:
Strength level of time slowdown effect
1 = 1% speed, 2 = 2% speed, 3 = 3% speed, 4 = 4% speed, 5 = 5% speed
Default: 3 (15% speed - perfect dodge level)
efn.config.yamato_parry_timeslow_delay.d:
Delay before time slowdown effect starts (in ticks)
20 ticks = 1 second. This creates a brief pause before the slowdown
Default: 5 ticks (0.25 seconds)
efn.config.yamato_parry_timeslow_duratio:
End time of time slowdown effect (in ticks)
20 ticks = 1 second. When the time slowdown end
Default: 3 ticks
efn.config.yamato_reward_enabled.desc:
Enable/disable the skill book reward for Yamato JudgementCut-End
When enabled, players will receive JudgementCut-End skill book after reaching the kill threshold
Default: true (enabled)
Number of kills required to receive the Yamato JudgementCut-End reward
Set to 0 to disable the reward system
Default: 100 kills
efn.warning.bottom_hint: This message will only appear once. You can always download AAA Particles later if needed.
efn.warning.close.tooltip: Close this window. (it will appear again the next time you start)
efn.warning.message: You have installed the EFN Mod, but the highly recommended companion mod AAA Particles is not currently installed.This mod significantly enhances the visual effects of EFN.
efn.warning.recommendation.details: For the best gameplay experience with EFN Mod, we strongly recommend installing AAA Particles. Without it, some visual effects may not display as intended or may be less impressive.
efn.warning.title: §l§eEFN Mod - Important Notice
enchantment.efn.scythe_enhance.desc: Every strike echoes with a blood cut while at max energy.
enchantment.efn.yamato_doppelganger.desc: Summon Doppelganger to assist in battle
enchantment.efn.yamato_guard.desc: Allow automatic guard when yamato attacking
enchantment.efn.yamato_summoned_sword.de: Summon phantom swords to assist in battle
item.efn.bloodlust.description1: A skeletal hand clutches the cursed blade shrouded in blood rust...
item.efn.broadblade.description1: §lThe time has come to slay the enemy and serve the nation!
item.efn.duskfire_armor.description1: §c§l Heavy armor reforged from Netherite bathed in flames, its core pulses with residual embers
item.efn.exsiliumgladius.description1: §o§lA weapon from the Land of Exile. Wielding both blades unlocks its true form
item.efn.fire_exsiliumgladius.descriptio: §o§lA weapon from the Land of Exile. Wielding both blades unlocks its true form
item.efn.kusabimaru.description1:
§lThe blade passed down by the Divine Heir of the Dragon's Heritage;
§i§lThe name 'Kusabimaru' carries a wish—even if a shinobi is fated to kill, they must never abandon the last shred of mercy in their heart...
item.efn.meen_spear.description1: Forged entirely from Netherite, this exceptionally heavy lance defies conventional spear techniques.
item.efn.nf_dual_sword.description1: A paired weapon discovered in an Ancient City, its crafting techniques lost to time
item.efn.ruinsgreatsword.description1: A massive sword excavated from beneath lava, surprisingly still functional after restoration
item.efn.sword_of_pioneer.description1: Commissioned by a king for his vanguard troops during their first Nether expedition, this exquisitely crafted saber remains as sharp as ever
item.efn.thornwheel.description1:
Great iron wheel lined with flesh-flaying blades. 
As the wheel spins it causes severe pain and blood loss.
pack.power.title: More Powerful Power：hill's trail
skill.efn.aetherialdusk.tooltip2: Quick tap launches enemies upward. Hold for a finishing strike
skill.efn.aetherialdusk.tooltip4: Perfect dodges enable quick counters with attack buffs
skill.efn.beastclaw.tooltip2: Unleash a savage roar forward, awakening the beast blood within. Feral power reduces stamina consumption and enhances attack power
skill.efn.bloodlust.tooltip2: Awaken the blade with bloodshed. Each slash carries sanguine power at the cost of continuous HP drain. Reactivate to end this state.
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip1: Nation Guardian: After parrying an attack, press
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip10: Execute: When target's health <= MaxHealth*0.2,press the key Special Ability 2
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip11: [§cLOCKED§r]:Need Enchantment——Revolution: Attacks have a 30% chance to ignore dodging and blocking; when triggered, deal additional damage equal to 5% of the target's current health
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip3: Iron Bones: Super armor during attack wind-up
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip4: Resolve: Damage increased to 1.5x when attack hits only one target
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip5: Army Breaker: When hitting more than 2 targets, deal additional damage equal to 2% of each target's current health
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip6: Bloodbath: Upon killing an enemy, gain speed boost and continuous health regeneration
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip7: Last Stand: When receiving a fatal blow, enter 15 seconds of 'Fighting Spirit'—greatly increased movement speed and damage, immune to ranged damage; death occurs after Fighting Spirit ends
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip8: Heroic Soul: After weapon kills exceed 100, gain immunity to darkness/blindness/slowness/mining fatigue; every 10s randomly gain two of the following: resistance boost/super armor/health regeneration/strength/effects
skill.efn.broadblade.tooltip9: Revolution: Attacks have a 30% chance to ignore dodging and blocking; when triggered, deal additional damage equal to 5% of the target's current health
skill.efn.crescentmoon.tooltip2: to deploy a domain: Continuously gain super armor within range, and restore health each time you are attacked
skill.efn.crescentmoon.tooltip4: Consume stamina to perform a charge with block; if successful, follow attack to unleash a super armor sweep
skill.efn.crescentmoon.tooltip6: Attacks deal 5% additional true damage to targets, stackable up to 10 times
skill.efn.crescentmoon.tooltip7: Afflicted targets suffer reduced speed, weakened attack power, and a 25% chance for their attacks to deal no damage;
skill.efn.execution.tooltip:
Press [%s] to launch an assault forward; %.1fs cooldown 
-『Soul Hunt』 reduces cooldown by %.1fs per kill during cooldown period 
-『Soul Hunt』 directly killing target reduces cooldown by %.1fs, gain %d innate skill stacks 
-『Soul Hunt』 hitting guard-broken target increases damage to %dx, impact to %dx, and reduces cooldown by %.1fs, gain %d innate skill stacks 
-『Soul Hunt』 directly killing target or hitting guard-broken target grants significant buffs
skill.efn.exsiliumgladius.tooltip2: Each attack can chain into multiple skills - experiment with different combinations
skill.efn.indestructible.tooltip:
§lTrue Combat Optimization:
- §lNo hitstun
- §lNo stamina cost
- §lDodge cancel anytime
- SLAY ALL!
skill.efn.judgementcutend.tooltip:
§l SLAY ALL 
 Press [%s] to use; %.1fs cooldown
skill.efn.judgementcutend.unlock_tip: Unlocked after learning from skill book
skill.efn.kusabimaru.tooltip6: Sneak & NightFallArtKey & Skill have learnt: §4WU SHEN ULTIMATE TECHNIQUE THE THREE FORMS OF ZERO INTENT
skill.efn.meenlance.tooltip1: Full energy——Hold both right-click and left-click simultaneously to charge
skill.efn.meenlance.tooltip2: Swing the spear to ignite residual flames, culminating in sweeping/thrusting attacks. At peak intensity, temporarily restores its former power
skill.efn.meenlance.tooltip3: Passive: Flame Tempest - Use skill while "Embers" peak
skill.efn.meenlance.tooltip4: Release all stored flames and wind in a devastating whirlwind attack
skill.efn.murasama.tooltip2: CrossCut·X §f||§r SlideSwipe·XX §f||§r FrontKick·XXX §f||§r FollowUp·XXXX §f||§r Air: DeadlyPeak-1·X §f||§r DeadlyPeak-2·XX
skill.efn.murasama.tooltip3: QuickDraw·Y §f||§r ReverseCross·XY §f||§r WideCut·XXY §f||§r TailWind·XXXY §f||§r Air: Avalanche·Y
skill.efn.murasama.tooltip5: AssaultRush· DoubleTap-Sprint: Y §f||§r JawBreaker Down-Up: Y
skill.efn.murasama.tooltip7: PiercingWinds· SheathedSprint: X §f||§r StiffBreeze SheathedSprint: Y §f||§r ChargingSlash·SheathedSneak-Y
skill.efn.parry_master.tooltip:
§lGains skill charge after each parry
-§l%d%% chance to ignore enemy defense (increases per successful parry)
-§lEnables ICHIMONJI counters when wielding tachi/uchigatana
skill.efn.pioneer.tooltip2: Initiate with rapid slashes, then break defenses with a hilt strike
skill.efn.precise_parry.tooltip:
§lParry within Parry:
-§lMore precise parrying; §lMore fierce counterattacks.
-Triggering parry at the perfect moment grants significant buffs and enhances the next attack within 0.7s.
skill.efn.ruinsgreatsword.tooltip2: Channel all your strength into an upward swing. When clashing with enemy attacks, you'll negate their strike and follow up with a powerful combo
skill.efn.ruinsgreatsword.tooltip3: Passive: Barbarian Arts - Hold both right-click and left-click simultaneously to charge
skill.efn.ruinsgreatsword.tooltip4: Charged attacks briefly negate incoming damage
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip10: §7└ §fSheathed Stance§r: Reduces dodge stamina cost, increases movement speed, and allows consuming energy to restore HP.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip12: Unleashes an extra slash when enchanted with Sweeping Edge III while the §aAttack Boost§r effect is active; gains a permanent extra slash enhancement when enchanted with §aCrimson Moon - Demonized§r at max energy.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip2: §7┌ §fBasic Attack§r: The 1st, 3rd, and 5th hits apply §cCurse of Blood§r (20s) to the target.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip3: §7├ If the target is immune to §cCurse of Blood§r, grant yourself §dBlood Blessing§r instead as an alternative for consumption.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip4: §7├ §fDash Attack§r: On hit, absorbs 1 stack of §cCurse of Blood§r to grant §bDamage Reduction§r (15s), up to 4 stacks.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip5: §7├ §fJump Attack§r: On hit, absorbs 1 stack of §cCurse of Blood§r to grant §eAttack Speed Boost§r (15s), up to 3 stacks.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip6: §7├ §fSkill: Harvest§r: Unleashes 3 spinning attacks. Deals increased damage to §cCurse of Blood§r targets and absorbs 1 stack per hit,
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip7: §7│ converting it into energy while granting Super Armor and stacking §aAttack Boost§r (15s), up to 6 stacks.
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip8: §7├ §fSkill Energy§r: Attacks generate energy. §6When fully charged, blocking allows casting the enhanced skill§r:
skill.efn.scythe_skill.tooltip9: §7│ §fSkill: Scarlet End§r: Unleashes a wide slash, clearing the target's §cCurse of Blood§r to deal bonus damage and restore HP based on stacks cleared.
skill.efn.shortsword.tooltip2: Activate temporal power, causing the next strike to additionally inflict damage equal to the last attack from 3.5 seconds ago
skill.efn.stomp.tooltip:
Press [%s] to consume %.1f stamina for a wide-area stomp attack; %.1fs cooldown 
-§lDeals extra damage to 'Vex' entities
skill.efn.thornwheel.tooltip2: to activate Thornwheel and dash forward; hold to continue attacking
skill.efn.thornwheel.tooltip3: Thornwheel's basic attacks stack Bleed on targets. When enough stacks accumulate, use Thornwheel Dash to detonate them, dealing massive damage
skill.efn.yamato.tooltip10: During repaidslash: Flarecut_rise·Jump §f||§r Flarecut·Forward §f||§r Volcanol·Backward §f||§r Judgementcut·Hold A §f||§r Divorce·devil
skill.efn.yamato.tooltip12: Summoned Sword-Angle·Teleport to target §f||§r Summoned Sword-Devil·Pull target to you §f||§r Spiral·Sneak (5 layers energy) §f||§r Rainstorm·Back (1 layer energy) §f||§r Blister·Forward (1 layer energy)
skill.efn.yamato.tooltip13: Doppelganger(press when sneak will summon behind target):
skill.efn.yamato.tooltip2: Slasher·AAA §f||§r Crosscut·AA-AAA §f||§r Judgementcut·Hold A §f||§r Upperslash·S §f||§r Upperslash_hold·Forward S
skill.efn.zansetsu.tooltip:
The mountains don't give back what they take...

◆ Activation Condition
 When holding 'HF-Murasama', hold [%s] to consume skill charge and enter 【Blade Mode】

◆ Mode Mechanics
 Duration: %.1f seconds × HF-Murasama's current weapon charge stacks
 Basic Operation: Move mouse left/right to switch slash direction
  · Click Left Button - Execute a single slash
  · Hold Left Button - Execute a reciprocating slash
 Advanced Operation: Hold [%s] to switch input mode
  In this mode, swipe mouse in 8 directions to directly execute slashes

◆ Finisher
 When slashes hit a certain number of times or target's health falls below a certain percentage
 Press RMB to execute 【Zandatsu】

※ This skill is exclusive to 'HF-Murasama', other weapons cannot use it
tooltip.efn.keybind_warning: Please ensure your Invincibile KeyBinding [KEY1] keybind is set to Left Click;
tooltip.efn.welcome_message: Use /efn secludedAttack to toggle entity effects for [Ancient Sculk Twinblades]
